title: Securing AI Agents with Zero Trust
description:
Ready to become a certified SOC Analyst - QRadar SIEM V7.5 Plus CompTIA Cybersecurity Analyst? Register now and use code IBMTechYT20 for 20% off of your exam → https://ibm.biz/BdbWJP

Learn more about Zero Trust here → https://ibm.biz/BdbWJy

Can you really trust AI agents? 🤖 Jeff Crume explains how Zero Trust principles secure autonomous systems, safeguard non-human identities, and block threats like prompt injection. Discover how to innovate securely with AI-driven, cutting-edge defenses. 🔒

AI news moves fast. Sign up for a monthly newsletter for AI updates from IBM → https://ibm.biz/BdpBw8
